Q1.notes: Information security policy approved by the CEO in January 2026 and communicated to all staff via the intranet.

Q2.notes: An asset inventory exists for servers and network equipment but laptops and mobile devices are not fully covered.

Q3.notes: No compliance register is maintained. Legal obligations are tracked informally by the CFO.

remediation.description: Create and maintain a register of applicable legal, regulatory, and contractual obligations. Assign a named owner and schedule quarterly reviews.

Q4.naReason: The organisation does not process personal data on behalf of third parties; GDPR obligations are limited to internal employee data, which is handled by the HR system.

domainNarratives.governance: Governance foundations are partially in place. A security policy exists but the compliance register requires formalisation and ongoing maintenance.
